description_long: This object represents an adult pedestrian with a highly abstracted and elongated form, featuring a sharply angular and narrow body profile. The figure appears to be standing upright, with a pronounced triangular torso and extremely thin, linear limbs extending downward. The head is small and subtly indicated at the top of the form, while the arms are barely distinguishable from the body, blending into the overall silhouette. The surface is smooth and reflective, giving the figure a metallic or glass-like appearance with some distortion in the reflections. The overall impression is stylized and minimalist, lacking detailed anatomical features or clothing folds.
description: A highly stylized, elongated adult pedestrian figure with a sharp, angular body and smooth, reflective surface, standing upright.
description_view_0: Front view shows the narrow, triangular torso and thin, linear legs extending downward, with minimal detail on the face or arms.
description_view_1: Side view emphasizes the extreme thinness of the figure and the sharp angularity of the torso, with limbs appearing as thin lines.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, showing the back of the triangular torso and the straight, thin legs, with no visible anatomical detail.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again highlights the slender profile and the abstract, elongated form of the figure.
attribute_clothing_type: abstracted form with no discernible clothing details
